description: Putin is testing nuclear-capable missiles for the first time in 1.5 years. Right before the parade in Moscow, "Military" of the Russian Federation announced missile tests at the "Kura" range in the Ust-Kamchatsky District from May 6 to 10. The presence of people and the movement of any equipment have already been banned on the territory. The last time such launches took place on October 29, 2024, when an intercontinental missile hit the test site...

title: Kramatorsk: Casualties reported
title_en: Kramatorsk: Casualties reported
description: In Kramatorsk, Donetsk region, a rescue operation is underway at the site of a Russian airstrike. They just hit the city center, people. As of now, at least five people are known to have been injured and five killed. Sincere condolences to family and friends. Unfortunately, the number of victims may increase. Now all services are working on the spot: rescuers, doctors - they are helping people.
description_en: In Kramatorsk, Donetsk region, a rescue operation is underway at the site of a Russian airstrike. They just hit the city center, people. As of now, at least five people are known to have been injured and five killed. Sincere condolences to family and friends. Unfortunately, the number of victims may increase. Now all services are working on the spot: rescuers, doctors - they are helping people.
description_uk: У Краматорську на Донеччині триває рятувальна операція на місці російського удару авіабомбами. Вдарили просто по центру міста, по людях. Станом на зараз відомо щонайменше про п’ятьох поранених та п’ятьох убитих людей. Щирі співчуття рідним і близьким. На жаль, кількість жертв може стати більшою. Зараз на місці працюють усі служби: рятувальники, медики – надають допомогу людям.
